name: financas-pessoais
description: Aplicativo pessoal de gestao financeira com React, Node.js, Prisma e PostgreSQL.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start:frontend: npm run build -w frontend && npm run preview -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
